title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at iGate India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at iGate India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
